name: frootai-mcp
description: The open glue for the GenAI ecosystem — 45 MCP tools spanning architecture guidance, solution plays, primitive management, model comparison, cost estimation, AI evaluation, and FAI Protocol orchestration. Context-wires 860+ primitives (238 agents, 176 instructions, 333 skills, 10 hooks, 77 plugins) across 104 solution plays via the FAI Protocol.

tools.name: search_knowledge
tools.description: BM25 search across 24 FROOT knowledge modules

tools.name: get_module
tools.description: Retrieve full module content by ID (F1-T3)

tools.name: get_play_detail
tools.description: Architecture, services, and config for any of 104 plays

tools.name: list_community_plays
tools.description: Browse all 104 solution plays with filters

tools.name: semantic_search_plays
tools.description: Natural language play discovery with BM25 ranking

tools.name: compare_plays
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2-3 plays

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Azure cost estimation for any play at dev/prod scale

tools.name: compare_models
tools.description: AI model comparison for specific use cases

tools.description: Azure OpenAI model catalog with pricing

tools.name: get_azure_pricing
tools.description: Azure AI pricing for RAG/agent/batch/realtime

tools.name: lookup_term

tools.description: Reviewer agent for security + quality checks
